speaker: Woman
en: I've heard that your travel agency provides holidays in the countryside.

speaker: Jack
en: We've specialized in countryside holidays with many years of experience, so we can ensure that we provide perfect holidays with several destinations.

speaker: Woman
en: My husband and I are planning a countryside holiday with the whole family, and I'm calling just for the accommodation.

speaker: Jack
en: Where are you going to spend your holiday?

speaker: Jack
en: There're some excellent accommodations on our list in different destinations.

speaker: Woman
en: Well, last year we spent our holiday in the southern part of the city, but this time we'd like to live in the northeast.

speaker: Woman
en: I have a friend who's just returned and had great fun there.

speaker: Jack
en: And what about the time of your holiday?

speaker: Woman
en: It'll be in the first week of September, which we think will be off-peak travel time.

speaker: Woman
en: At peak season, the attractions are always crowded with people, and hotels or restaurants might overcharge you, so we try to avoid that.

speaker: Jack
en: Yes, arranging your holiday during off-peak time is wise as you can enjoy the attractions and facilities better.

speaker: Jack
en: Then how long are you going to stay?

speaker: Woman
en: Our holiday will last three days, and we will stay there for a weekend.

speaker: Jack
en: That's the location and time of the holiday.

speaker: Jack
en: Then let's turn to the accommodation itself.

speaker: Jack
en: Do you have any particular requirements for housing?

speaker: Woman
en: Yes, the first priority we've considered is, of course, a quiet environment so that both young and old can have good rest during our stay.

speaker: Woman
en: Then we'd prefer a cottage on a good beach where my children can play with great fun.

speaker: Woman
en: My little daughter loves collecting shells and building sandcastles.

speaker: Jack
en: It also means secluded nights and fresh sea air.

speaker: Woman
en: Oh, another thing is, I'm kind of a foodie, and whenever I visit a new place, I'm always desperate to try the local cuisine.

speaker: Woman
en: So if possible, I'd prefer a good restaurant not far away from where we live.

speaker: Jack
en: Tasting the local cuisine is one of the delights of the holiday.

speaker: Jack
en: Then what about the actual room?

speaker: Woman
en: Our family has five members, so we'll need a cottage with three living rooms and a separate bathroom with a shower.

speaker: Jack
en: Three living rooms and a separate bathroom with a shower.

speaker: Woman
en: Oh, another important thing is, my father got his backache last week, and climbing stairs might cause trouble.

speaker: Woman
en: I'm concerned that he might not recover from it during our holiday, so there shouldn't be any stairs in the cottage, I'm afraid.

speaker: Woman
en: Actually, it's not necessary for us, but if possible, we need a garden, you know, where the children can play.

speaker: Jack
en: Several cottages cater to your need.

speaker: Woman
en: Well, that's all our needs for the accommodation.

speaker: Jack
en: OK, I've written down all the details.

speaker: Jack
en: And I'll contact you as soon as I find the one which can satisfy your needs.

speaker: Jack
en: Before we finish, I'd like to know where you heard about us.

speaker: Woman
en: I saw the ads of your travel agency in a magazine called Countryside Living.
